name: Blume
description: Provider of a female hygiene subscription box service intended to deliver safe and sustainable period products. The company offers a customized selection of pads and tampons, acne-fighting products, hygiene, and self-care items, enabling young females to get personal care products easily at their doorstep without needing to run to the drug store.

name: Chaart
description: Operator of an art asset management platform intended for collecting art in a smarter way. The company's platform manages art including original paintings, prints, art toys, posters, and goods, and tracks the value of the collection, enabling users to discover art trends through collectors' authentic collections.

name: Fishbit
description: Developer of an EV charging platform intended to offer an open marketplace for electric vehicle charging. The company platform works as a facilitator in e-mobility and smart grid ecosystems and is a solution for operations, management, energy optimization, and payment for operators of EV chargers, enabling charge point operators to establish EV charging operations that scale fast and efficiently.

name: Dinari
description: Operator of stock options and incentive management platform intended to provide direct exposure to stock plans and public trading. The company's platform offers a wide range of services from equity management and options grants to payroll compliance, taxes, and vesting schedules, enabling investors with direct exposure to the trusted asset with simple and easy incentive management

name: Drover AI
description: Developer of micro-mobility technologies designed to elevate the micro-mobility industry and tie into the smart city eco-systems. The company develops an advanced IoT module for micro-mobility vehicles that is capable of granular infrastructure distinction in real-time without the need for ground truth information or precise GPS and can accurately and reliably identify sidewalks, streets, and bike lanes, enabling cities to manage regulatory compliance across multiple operators simultaneously and users to navigate without hassle.

name: EMTECH
description: Developer of cloud-based software designed to provide central banks with scalable and resilient digital infrastructure. The company offers digital regulatory sandboxes for multi-party collaborative workflows, digital cash, and digital currency integrators for cross-border integration among others, enabling central banks to modernize operations and improve efficiency.

name: Englease FZ LLC
description: Provider of an online educational platform intended to prepare for English proficiency tests. The company's platform offers one-to-one sessions that assist users in tracking their progress, consolidating their learning and making time to assess their future learning needs, and providing online courses for preparing for exams like IELTS and TOEFL, enabling users in the MENA region to improve their fluency in English.

name: Finku
description: Developer of finance management platform designed to eliminate financial illiteracy in Indonesia. The company's platform lets users achieve financial goals through the automatic financial logger, financial insight and personalized monthly budget, and recurring billing reminders, enabling people to manage all their finances in one place.

name: Tamadé
description: Developer of a biofeedback and virtual reality-based therapy platform designed to manage pain and anxiety. The company's platform features interactive experiences that teach users how to regulate their nervous system through training, keep track of their progress, and share it with a supportive community, enabling users to overcome pain and anxiety through virtual reality and relaxation.

name: Funway
description: Operator of card game show and competitive tournaments. The company hosts mahjong events throughout Taiwan, enabling players to stay connected through competitive tournaments.

name: Get
description: Operator of a financial platform intended to assist teens in saving and using money wisely. The company's platform helps users manage money while learning financial literacy and independence at an earlier age, even shop with their personalized card and get spending notifications via mobile application, enabling users to easily send and receive money with family and friends instantly.

name: MeetAsh
description: Operator of a software and logistics remote diagnostics company intended to offer at-home self-collected diagnostic testing services. The company integrates with clients so that they can offer at-home testing kits on behalf of patients to collect samples at home and send them back to partner labs, that are reviewed by licensed clinicians, thereby enabling customers to access remote diagnostics with secure infrastructure or preferred tech stack.

name: Mejuri
description: Operator of an e-commerce platform intended to sell handcrafted fine jewelry for everyday use. The company's direct-to-consumer e-commerce platform features products such as rings, pendants, earrings, bracelets, and other luxury jewelry made up of precious and semi-precious stones, enabling women to buy handcrafted accessories online.

name: MemeChat
description: Developer of an online platform intended to help meme creators receive remuneration from brands for their content. The company's platform leverages technology to provide a space for users to express themselves in the form of memes on a plethora of issues and also for brands to access those memes, enabling creators to create memes using paid templates and get paid upon their approval or earn making memes in the requested category and get paid.

name: Notti
description: Operator of an online store intended to change the pet industry in Malaysia. The company offers slow-baked, grain-free kibbles made with protein content and human-grade fresh meat designed to support pet health and wellness, enabling owners to provide healthy food option to their pets.

name: Pawsh
description: Developer of a pet grooming application designed to make the pet care delivery system transparent and friendly. The company's application connects users with top-rated and vetted pet grooming experts who come directly to their homes for a delightful grooming session, enabling pet owners to groom their pets easily and witness the grooming process from start to finish, and be satisfied with the way grooming services are performed.

name: Plenna
description: Provider of health care services intended to provide comprehensive in-person and virtual care to middle-income women in Mexico. The company offers services related to gynecology, psychology, nutrition, laboratories and tests, vaccines and general medicine, enabling women to make timely and informed decisions about their sexual and reproductive life.

name: Pluto Brand
description: Manufacturer of customized pillows intended to cater to individuals' body stats and sleep patterns. The company designs pillows after collecting data from customers through a questionnaire and uses proprietary algorithms to create custom pillows for their unique sleep profiles, enabling customers to find pillows that suit their sleep styles.

name: TTRacing
description: Manufacturer of gaming chairs and accessories intended to provide long hours of comfort for greater productivity and performance. The company offers ergonomic gaming chairs as well as smart desks, cable organizers, cushions, casters, and many more, enabling gamers to play and enjoy games comfortably.

name: Workclass
description: Operator of an online job search platform intended to serve blue-collar workers. The company offers to help match employers with relevant workers as well as provides a portal for candidates to search and find jobs matching their skills, enabling individuals to search for jobs as well as provide companies access to resumes and hire matching candidates.

name: PlateJoy
description: Provider of online platform intended to offer personalized nutrition plan and grocery list guides. The company's online platform offers information on customized shopping lists and simple recipes, enabling users maintain a healthy diet for weight loss and dietary improvements inspite of their busy schedule.

name: The Beard Club
description: Provider of grooming and beard products for men. The company provides subscription based high quality beard and grooming products, beard gear, oil, male gel and accessories for men that are made from organic materials.

name: Piper Inc.
description: Developer of a computer kit designed to let children assemble their own computers. The company's computer kit is pre-installed with 10 worlds that interact with the computer kit while being built, utilizing in-game directions for how to add on to the hardware and sensors in order to advance in the game, enabling kids to create with code and electronics and learn the basics of technology through tangible play.

name: HAMAMA
description: Provider of microgreen kits intended to grow food at home. The company's kits offer plants like wheatgrass, cat grass, seed quilts and other related plants, enabling customers to live a healthy life by growing superfoods at home.
